rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify inputs before making financial decisions.
Consult a licensed financial advisor for personalized advice.

description.short: Calculate real return — nominal return adjusted for inflation.
description.long: Calculate real return — nominal return adjusted for inflation.

short_i18n.en: Calculate real return — nominal return adjusted for inflation.
short_i18n.tr: Enflasyon etkisi çıkarılmış net satın alma gücü artışını (reel getiri) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnung der realen Rendite — nominale Rendite inflationsbereinigt.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le rendement réel — rendement nominal ajusté de l'inflation.
short_i18n.es: Calcular el rendimiento real — rendimiento nominal ajustado por inflación.
short_i18n.ar: احسب العائد الحقيقي — العائد الاسمي المعدل حسب التضخم.

long_i18n.en: Calculate real return — nominal return adjusted for inflation.
long_i18n.tr: Enflasyon etkisi çıkarılmış net satın alma gücü artışını (reel getiri) hesaplar.
long_i18n.de: Berechnung der realen Rendite — nominale Rendite inflationsbereinigt.
long_i18n.fr: Calculer le rendement réel — rendement nominal ajusté de l'inflation.
